page.title: About
page.description: Learn about Zion International School, our mission, campus, and values.

hero.title: Purposeful education for capable, compassionate students.
hero.text: Our school blends academic discipline, creativity, wellbeing, and service so students can grow with confidence.

image.alt: Teacher helping students in a classroom

story.title: We help students learn deeply and live generously.
story.text: Zion is built around clear teaching, strong relationships, and opportunities that help students discover what they can contribute.
story.body: The starter content is intentionally structured for future CMS editing. Replace this page copy with your school's story, values, accreditations, leadership message, and admissions details.
